message:
bd-3bxhj.5.2: Gap triage and prioritization model (impact x frequency x risk)

Adds gap_triage module with multi-signal scoring formula: impact weight,
corpus frequency, migration blocking severity, and implementation risk.
Groups gaps into immediate, near-term, and deferred buckets with tunable
thresholds. Also fixes clippy while_let_loop in state_effects.rs.

18 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
